revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Narita, Chiba |state = {{{state| autocollapse}}} |title = [[Narita, Chiba]] |listclass = hlist |below = This list is incomplete.
|group1= [[Municipal mergers and dissolutions in Japan|Merged municipalities]] |list1= * [[Shimofusa, Chiba|Shimofusa]] * [[Taiei, Chiba|Taiei]]
|group2= Senior high schools |list2 = * [[Narita North High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田北高等学校|千葉県立成田北高等学校]]) * [[Narita Seiryo High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田西陵高等学校|千葉県立成田西陵高等学校]]) * [[Shimofusa High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立下総高等学校|千葉県立下総高等学校]]) * [[Narita Kokusai High School|Narita Kokusai (Int'l) HS]] * [[Narita Private Junior and Senior High School]] ([[:ja:成田高等学校・付属中学校|成田高等学校・付属中学校]])
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = * [[Komikado Shrine]] * [[Narita International Airport]] * [[Narita-san]] * [[Narita Wholesale Market]]
|group4 = Train stations |list4 = *[[Higashi-Narita Station]] (East Narita) *[[Keisei Narita Station]] *[[Kōzunomori Station]] *[[Kuzumi Station]] *[[Narita Station]] *[[Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station]] *[[Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station]] *[[Narita Yukawa Station]] *[[Namegawa Station]] *[[Shimōsa-Manzaki Station]]
|group5 = History |list5 = *[[FedEx Express Flight 80]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Narita, Chiba|µ]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Narita, Chiba |state = {{{state| autocollapse}}} |title = [[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita, Chiba]] |listclass = hlist |below = This list is incomplete.
|group1= [[:en:Municipal mergers and dissolutions in Japan|Merged municipalities]] |list1= * [[Shimofusa, Chiba|Shimofusa]] * [[Taiei, Chiba|Taiei]]
|group2= Senior high schools |list2 = * [[Narita North High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田北高等学校|千葉県立成田北高等学校]]) * [[Narita Seiryo High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田西陵高等学校|千葉県立成田西陵高等学校]]) * [[Shimofusa High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立下総高等学校|千葉県立下総高等学校]]) * [[Narita Kokusai High School|Narita Kokusai (Int'l) HS]] * [[Narita Private Junior and Senior High School]] ([[:ja:成田高等学校・付属中学校|成田高等学校・付属中学校]])
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = * [[Komikado Shrine]] * [[:en:Narita International Airport|Narita International Airport]] * [[:en:Narita-san|Narita-san]] * [[Narita Wholesale Market]]
|group4 = Train stations |list4 = *[[:en:Higashi-Narita Station|Higashi-Narita Station]] (East Narita) *[[:en:Keisei Narita Station|Keisei Narita Station]] *[[:en:Kōzunomori Station|Kōzunomori Station]] *[[:en:Kuzumi Station|Kuzumi Station]] *[[Narita Station]] *[[:en:Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station|Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station]] *[[:en:Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station|Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station]] *[[Narita Yukawa Station]] *[[:en:Namegawa Station|Namegawa Station]] *[[Shimōsa-Manzaki Station]]
|group5 = History |list5 = *[[:en:FedEx Express Flight 80|FedEx Express Flight 80]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Narita, Chiba|µ]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Narita, Chiba |state = {{{state| autocollapse}}} |title = [[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita, Chiba]] |listclass = hlist |below = This list is incomplete.
|group1= [[:en:Municipal mergers and dissolutions in Japan|Merged municipalities]] |list1= * [[:en:Shimofusa, Chiba|Shimofusa]] * [[:en:Taiei, Chiba|Taiei]]
|group2= Senior high schools |list2 = * [[Narita North High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田北高等学校|千葉県立成田北高等学校]]) * [[Narita Seiryo High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田西陵高等学校|千葉県立成田西陵高等学校]]) * [[Shimofusa High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立下総高等学校|千葉県立下総高等学校]]) * [[:en:Narita Kokusai High School|Narita Kokusai (Int'l) HS]] * [[Narita Private Junior and Senior High School]] ([[:ja:成田高等学校・付属中学校|成田高等学校・付属中学校]])
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = * [[Komikado Shrine]] * [[:en:Narita International Airport|Narita International Airport]] * [[:en:Narita-san|Narita-san]] * [[:en:Narita Wholesale Market|Narita Wholesale Market]]
|group4 = Train stations |list4 = *[[:en:Higashi-Narita Station|Higashi-Narita Station]] (East Narita) *[[:en:Keisei Narita Station|Keisei Narita Station]] *[[:en:Kōzunomori Station|Kōzunomori Station]] *[[:en:Kuzumi Station|Kuzumi Station]] *[[:en:Narita Station|Narita Station]] *[[:en:Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station|Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station]] *[[:en:Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station|Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station]] *[[:en:Narita Yukawa Station|Narita Yukawa Station]] *[[:en:Namegawa Station|Namegawa Station]] *[[:en:Shimōsa-Manzaki Station|Shimōsa-Manzaki Station]]
|group5 = History |list5 = *[[:en:FedEx Express Flight 80|FedEx Express Flight 80]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Narita, Chiba|µ]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Narita, Chiba |state = {{{state| autocollapse}}} |title = [[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita, Chiba]] |listclass = hlist |below = This list is incomplete.
|group1= [[:en:Municipal mergers and dissolutions in Japan|Merged municipalities]] |list1= * [[:en:Shimofusa, Chiba|Shimofusa]] * [[:en:Taiei, Chiba|Taiei]]
|group2= Senior high schools |list2 = * [[Narita North High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田北高等学校|千葉県立成田北高等学校]]) * [[Narita Seiryo High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立成田西陵高等学校|千葉県立成田西陵高等学校]]) * [[Shimofusa High School]] ([[:ja:千葉県立下総高等学校|千葉県立下総高等学校]]) * [[:en:Narita Kokusai High School|Narita Kokusai (Int'l) HS]] * [[Narita Private Junior and Senior High School]] ([[:ja:成田高等学校・付属中学校|成田高等学校・付属中学校]])
|group3 = Landmarks |list3 = * [[Komikado Shrine]] * [[:en:Narita International Airport|Narita International Airport]] * [[:en:Narita-san|Narita-san]] * [[:en:Narita Wholesale Market|Narita Wholesale Market]]
|group4 = Train stations |list4 = *[[:en:Higashi-Narita Station|Higashi-Narita Station]] (East Narita) *[[:en:Keisei Narita Station|Keisei Narita Station]] *[[:en:Kōzunomori Station|Kōzunomori Station]] *[[:en:Kuzumi Station|Kuzumi Station]] *[[:en:Narita Station|Narita Station]] *[[:en:Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station|Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station]] *[[:en:Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station|Narita Airport Terminal 2·3 Station]] *[[:en:Narita Yukawa Station|Narita Yukawa Station]] *[[:en:Namegawa Station|Namegawa Station]] *[[:en:Shimōsa-Manzaki Station|Shimōsa-Manzaki Station]]
|group5 = History |list5 = *[[:en:FedEx Express Flight 80|FedEx Express Flight 80]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Narita, Chiba|µ]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
